name: Lisinopril
explanation_deep: ACE inhibition increases bradykinin causing cough and swelling.
explanation_ar: قد يسبب كحة وتورم بسبب زيادة البراديكينين.

name: Ramipril
explanation_deep: Can lead to swelling due to ACE inhibition.

name: Valsartan
explanation_deep: Leads to vasodilation causing BP drop.

name: Finasteride
explanation_deep: Reduces male hormones affecting sexual function.

name: Sildenafil
explanation_deep: Combining with nitrates causes dangerous BP drop.
explanation_ar: يخفض الضغط بشدة مع أدوية أخرى.

name: Methotrexate
explanation_deep: Suppresses rapidly dividing cells including immune.

name: Levodopa
explanation_deep: Improves movement but causes involuntary motion.
